title: Implicit Bias Injection Attacks against Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
title_zh: 隐式偏见注入攻击：针对文本到图像扩散模型
abstract: The proliferation of text-to-image diffusion models (T2I DMs) has led to an increased presence of AI-generated images in daily life. However, biased T2I models can generate content with specific tendencies, potentially influencing people’s perceptions. Intentional exploitation of these biases risks conveying misleading information to the public. Current research on bias primarily addresses explicit biases with recognizable visual patterns, such as skin color and gender. This paper introduces a novel form of implicit bias that lacks explicit visual features but can manifest in diverse ways across various semantic contexts. This subtle and versatile nature makes this bias challenging to detect, easy to propagate, and adaptable to a wide range of scenarios. We further propose an implicit bias injection attack framework (IBI-Attacks) against T2I diffusion models by precomputing a general bias direction in the prompt embedding space and adaptively adjusting it based on different inputs. Our attack module can be seamlessly integrated into pre-trained diffusion models in a plug-and-play manner without direct manipulation of user input or model retraining. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our scheme in introducing bias through subtle and diverse modifications while preserving the original semantics. The strong concealment and transferability of our attack across various scenarios further underscore the significance of our approach.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像扩散模型（T2I DMs）的普及导致AI生成图像在日常生活中日益增多。然而，有偏见的T2I模型可能生成带有特定倾向的内容，从而影响人们的认知。故意利用这些偏见有可能向公众传递误导性信息。当前关于偏见的研究主要关注具有可识别视觉模式的显式偏见，如肤色和性别。本文引入了一种新型的隐式偏见，它缺乏显式视觉特征，但能在各种语义上下文中以不同方式表现。这种微妙且多变的特性使得该偏见难以检测、易于传播，并能适应广泛场景。我们进一步提出了一种针对T2I扩散模型的隐式偏见注入攻击框架（IBI-Attacks），通过在提示嵌入空间中预计算通用偏见方向，并根据不同输入自适应调整。我们的攻击模块可以即插即用地无缝集成到预训练扩散模型中，无需直接操作用户输入或重新训练模型。大量实验验证了我们的方案在通过微妙且多样的修改引入偏见的同时保持原始语义的有效性。我们的攻击在各种场景下的强隐蔽性和可迁移性进一步凸显了我们方法的重要性。
tldr_zh: 提出一种隐式偏见注入攻击，通过预计算偏见方向并自适应调整，在保持语义的同时引入难以检测的偏见。
cover_zh: AI绘画也有隐藏偏见？｜新攻击让模型悄悄带节奏，你根本看不出来
